# Evgeny Shkuratov — Portfolio

> Site: https://www.shkuratovdesigner.com
> Contact: shkuratovdesigner@gmail.com
> LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/evgeny-shkuratov-b34a99174/

## About

Evgeny Shkuratov is an AI Product Design Engineer with 8+ years of experience. He specializes in designing and building digital products that combine strong design thinking with modern engineering.

## Key Expertise

- Product Design Engineering
- Design Systems
- Figma Plugins & Tooling
- AI-Powered Design Workflows
- SaaS Product Design
- React Component Systems

## Site Contents

This portfolio showcases Evgeny's work through case studies, product design projects, work experience, and design content.

## Pages

/ — Home page with character animation and pose-based navigation
/experience — Work history timeline with detailed career progression
/products — Product design projects and shipped work
/cases — Case studies with real-world design challenges and measurable outcomes
/content — Design content and resources including YouTube videos, LinkedIn posts, and Instagram reels
/about — About Evgeny, personal interests, and design philosophy
